note: First real-source pass. Entertainment trade feeds are enabled for Highlander testing. Official food-law feeds use Federal Register RSS searches. Candidate recall and extension feeds stay disabled until verified.

sources.name: Deadline Hollywood
sources.notes: General entertainment trade feed. Strict Highlander topic rules should filter noise.

sources.name: The Hollywood Reporter
sources.notes: General entertainment trade feed. Watch for Highlander casting, production, and release updates.

sources.name: Variety
sources.notes: General entertainment trade feed. Strict matching required.

sources.name: Collider
sources.notes: Entertainment news feed likely to catch genre-film updates.

sources.name: Federal Register: FDA Food
sources.notes: Official Federal Register search feed for FDA food-related documents.

sources.name: Federal Register: FSIS
sources.notes: Official Federal Register search feed for Food Safety and Inspection Service documents.

sources.name: ScreenRant Candidate Feed
sources.notes: Candidate source. Enable only if the first trade feeds miss too much.

sources.name: ComicBook Candidate Feed
sources.notes: Candidate source. Useful for genre/franchise chatter but may be noisy.

sources.name: FDA Recalls and Safety Alerts Candidate
sources.notes: Candidate FDA recall feed. Keep disabled until the watcher confirms the feed parses.

sources.name: Sample Highlander Feed
sources.notes: Local sample feed for dry-run testing only.
